title: IndustrialZone schema
description: An industrial zone, including land availability, infrastructure, access, sustainability and lifecycle information.

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It has to be IndustrialZone.

address.description: Property. Address associated with the industrial zone. Model:'https://schema.org/address'.

addressLocality.description: Property. The locality, which must correspond to the municipality. Model:'https://schema.org/addressLocality'.

addressRegion.description: Property. The NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located. Model:'https://schema.org/addressRegion'.

district.description: Property. The administrative district in which the locality is located.

alternateName.description: Property. Alternative name of the industrial zone. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

availabilityStatus.description: Property. Aggregated availability status of the industrial zone.

availableLandArea.description: Property. Land area available for new activities, normally expressed in square metres.

beginLifespanVersion.description: Property. Start date and time of this record lifecycle version in ISO 8601 format.

dataProvider.description: Property. Identifier of the data provider. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

dateCreated.description: Property. Record creation date and time in ISO 8601 format.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time of the latest record modification in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Property. Textual description of the purpose of the industrial zone. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

ecoIndustrialFeatures.description: Property. Sustainability and industrial symbiosis features of the zone.

endLifespanVersion.description: Property. End date and time of this record lifecycle version, or null for the current version.

environmentalCertification.description: Property. Whether the industrial zone has a recognized environmental certification.

establishmentsCount.description: Property. Number of establishments or operators installed in the zone.

hasElectricity.description: Property. Whether electricity supply is available.

hasGasNetwork.description: Property. Whether a gas network is available.

hasLot.description: Relationship. References to IndustrialLot entities within the industrial zone.

hasTelecomConnectivity.description: Property. Whether telecommunications connectivity is available.

hasWastewaterService.description: Property. Whether wastewater drainage and treatment service is available.

hasWaterSupply.description: Property. Whether water supply is available.

landUse.description: Property. Land use applicable to the industrial zone.

location.description: GeoProperty. Polygon or MultiPolygon location of the industrial zone.

municipality.description: Relationship. Reference to the administrative entity representing the municipality.

name.description: Property. Main name of the industrial zone. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

occupancyRate.description: Property. Aggregated occupancy percentage of the industrial zone.

occupiedLandArea.description: Property. Land area occupied by economic activities, normally expressed in square metres.

portAccess.description: Property. Whether direct or functionally associated port access is available.

railAccess.description: Property. Whether rail access is available.

refPointOfInterest.description: Relationship. Reference to an associated PointOfInterest entity.

reservedLandArea.description: Property. Land area reserved but not yet physically occupied, normally expressed in square metres.

roadAccess.description: Property. Whether adequate road access is available.

servicedLandArea.description: Property. Total serviced land area, normally expressed in square metres.

source.description: Property. Administrative, technical or documentary source supporting the entity data.
